name: Tata Neu Plus Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Select categories on Tata Neu App/Website
rewards.displayRate: Up to 7% Value Back as NeuCoins

rewards.displayCategory: Partner Tata brands and other Tata Neu spends

domestic: 4 domestic airport lounge visits every year, capped at 1 per quarter, apply only if spends in the previous quarter are at least ₹50,000.

exclusions: wallet loads, gift or prepaid card loads, and voucher purchases
joiningBenefits: 499 NeuCoins as welcome benefit within 15 days of joining fee realisation

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 499 NeuCoins as welcome benefit within 15 days of joining fee realisation

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from ₹500 to ₹4,000, capped at ₹250 per statement cycle

redemption.ecosystemLabel: Tata Neu App/Website and partner Tata brands

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

additionalDetails: 1 NeuCoin equals Re 1 savings on Tata Neu App/Website and partner Tata brands
internalNotes: Audited against official SBI Card product page and Tata Neu Plus T&C booklet on 2026-06-08.

The product page currently positions the accelerated extra 5% NeuCoins specifically around select Tata Neu app or website categories, so the rewards table keeps a separate display row instead of treating all Tata ecosystem spends as a flat 7% bucket.
UPI spends on the RuPay variant are capped at 500 NeuCoins per statement cycle.
The current official materials describe welcome NeuCoins posting within 15 days of joining fee realisation.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-09.
